ol.li: be capable of switching on and off electric power at variable pre-programmed times and on variable pre-programmed days; and
have the ability to program public holidays at least 1 year ahead.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A time switch for internal lighting must be capable of being overridden by—

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A time switch for external lighting must be capable of being configured to limit the period the system is switched on to between 30 minutes before sunset and 30 minutes after sunrise.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A time switch for boiling water or chilled water storage units must be capable of being overridden for a maximum period of 2 hours outside normal operating hours.
